content:
You are given the following task to perform in Dafny:

Write a method that computes and returns the dimensions of a letter-size (8.5 x 11 inches) sheet of paper in millimeters. There are 25.4 millimeters per inch. Use constants and comments in your method.

The signature should be:

p_2_1_letter_dimensions() returns (width: real, height: real)

The method should respect the following contract:

ensures width == 8.5 * 25.4, ensures height == 11.0 * 25.4

Produce and show only the Dafny body of this method, including the curly braces that surround it. Do not show the signature nor contract. You must not use 'assume' nor 'expect' anywhere in your code.

When using dafny resolve, the below error is emitted and resolve fails:

problem_data/p_2_1_letter_dimensions/program.dfy(6,2): Error: rbrace expected
  |
6 |   const millimetersPerInch: real := 25.4;
  |   ^

problem_data/p_2_1_letter_dimensions/program.dfy(6,40): Warning: deprecated style: a semi-colon is not needed here
  |
6 |   const millimetersPerInch: real := 25.4;
  |                                         ^

problem_data/p_2_1_letter_dimensions/program.dfy(9,38): Warning: deprecated style: a semi-colon is not needed here
  |
9 |   const letterWidthInches: real := 8.5;
  |                                       ^

problem_data/p_2_1_letter_dimensions/program.dfy(10,40): Warning: deprecated style: a semi-colon is not needed here
   |
10 |   const letterHeightInches: real := 11.0;
   |                                         ^

problem_data/p_2_1_letter_dimensions/program.dfy(13,2): Error: this symbol not expected in Dafny
   |
13 |   width := letterWidthInches * millimetersPerInch;
   |   ^

2 parse errors detected in program.dfy

Correct the error in code by altering only the method body. Produce and show only the Dafny body, including the curly braces that surround it. Do not show the signature nor contract. You must not use 'assume' nor 'expect' anywhere in your code.
